Agent: I now have what I need. Current blocker is resolved (`geth` built successfully), so execution plan is: 1. Generate fresh genesis from your 6 addresses + one validator wallet. 2. Start validator node on this server (`173.249.60.164`) with RPC on a clean port. 3. Copy binary + genesis to `158.220.99.14` and start node-2 as a peer/full node. 4. Verify both nodes peer and that blocks advance, then give you final RPC URL + chain ID. I’m executing step 1 now.

Agent: Both nodes are now peered and synced on chain ID `171401`. I’m doing one final reliability step: moving node1 from an ad-hoc process to a proper persistent systemd service so it survives restarts cleanly.

Running: cat > /etc/systemd/system/goldchain-node1.service <<'EOF' [Unit] Description=Gold Chain Validator Node 1 After=network.target [Service] Type=simple User=root Restart=always RestartSec=5 ExecStart=/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc/build/bin/geth \\ --datadir /srv/repos/gold-chain/.live-testnet/node1 \\ --networkid 171401 \\ --port 30323 \\ --nat extip:173.249.60.164 \\ --http --http.addr 0.0.0.0 --http.port 18545 \\ --http.api eth,net,web3,txpool,debug,admin,personal \\ --ws --ws.addr 0.0.0.0 --ws.port 18546 \\ --ws.api eth,net,web3,txpool,debug,admin,personal \\ --allow-insecure-unlock \\ --unlock 0xda238b0006f8c05ceb5c9c4416c04e39dc097af1 \\ --password /srv/repos/gold-chain/.live-testnet/node1/password.txt \\ --mine --miner.etherbase 0xda238b0006f8c05ceb5c9c4416c04e39dc097af1 \\ --syncmode full \\ --ipcpath /srv/repos/gold-chain/.live-testnet/node1/geth.ipc [Install] WantedBy=multi-user.target EOF systemctl daemon-reload if pgrep -f '/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc/build/bin/geth --datadir /srv/repos/gold-chain/.live-testnet/node1' >/dev/null; then pkill -f '/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc/build/bin/geth --datadir /srv/repos/gold-chain/.live-testnet/node1' sleep 2 fi systemctl enable --now goldchain-node1 systemctl status goldchain-node1 --no-pager
